AppDescription: MQTT uplink monitor + pluggable payload decoders + tailored RadioBridge dashboards (charts + animations) + configuration/downlinks + cloud integrations. Import gateway JSON history on uplinks page.
AppVersionNotes: Login/auth flow improvements and startup login gating. Sensor Monitor updates: unified RadioBridge Status (animations + alarms + live values), live updates from incoming uplinks, RF/battery telemetry row cleanup, and sidebar/nav consistency updates across pages.
